zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Susan Danvers於大約1505年出生在英國維爾爾道千時，她的父親Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey54歲，母親Anne Stradling37歲。她於大約1524年與Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1527年享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Susan Danvers于大约1505年出生在英国維爾爾道千时，她的父亲Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey54岁，母亲Anne Stradling37岁。她于大约1524年与Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1527年享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: Danvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Susan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Suzan
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Susanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Susan Danvers was born about 1505, in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, was 54 and her mother, Anne Stradling, was 37. She married Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury about 1524. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1527, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Susan Danvers est née environ 1505, à Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Anne Stradling, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury environ 1524. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1527, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Susan Danvers um 1505 in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey 54 und ihre Mutter Anne Stradling 37. Sie hat um 1524 Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1527 im Alter von 24 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Susan Danvers è nata il circa 1505 nel Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Anne Stradling, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury circa 1524. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1527, all'età di 24 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Danversが約1505年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアダウントセイで生まれた時，父Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfeyは54歳，母Anne Stradlingは37歳であった。約1524年にWalter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1527年に24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Danvers(이)가 대략 1505년 영국 윌츠히르 도츠이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Stradling(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1524년 Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1527년 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Susan Danvers nasceu aproximadamente 1505, em Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Anne Stradling, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury aproximadamente 1524. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1527, com 24 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Susan Danvers родилась около 1505 г. в местности даунци, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Stradling, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury около 1524 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1527 г. в возрасте 24 лет.

sm.about 1505–about 1527: e tusa o le 1505–e tusa o le 1527

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Susan Danvers nació aproximadamente 1505, en Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Anne Stradling, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury aproximadamente 1524. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1527, a la edad de 24 años.
